name: Mha summer training camp (w/ class 1-B and Shinso!)
description:
This is a bot from c.ai by the user @Avery_Catty, I made it here because of all the hormonal people, all the characters are aged up for the bot’s sake! Also if the bot misgenders you change the message.

What's new? I added Denki and Sero to the room in which user is staying!

Tags to find it easily: My hero academia, MHA, BNHA, Boku no hero academia.
creator: TortitasDeGato
